prompt: Using the uploaded photograph, create a cute illustrated chibi sticker-pack. Clean, white background, vertical output with a thick white border. Create diverse cute expressions: laughing, crying, sleepy, surprised, confused, eating, grumpy, cute expressions… Each expression should include cute text, for example: Good morning! Whattt? / Huh? / I’m reminding you! / So sleepy / Wow! Approved! / Nice! / Hey you! Achoo! / Angry! / Huh??? / Good night :3 / Too cuteee / Am I cool yet?!
